assertion_results.text: Output must mention CI run time of 47 minutes
assertion_results.evidence: Area scores: '47-min builds; 15-year-old Jenkins; no fast feedback'. Blocker 2: '47-minute CI build — feedback is too slow to be actionable'.

assertion_results.text: Output must address flaky tests specifically (not just 'tests exist')
assertion_results.evidence: Executive summary: '30% flaky tests and a 47-minute CI build destroy developer trust'. Blocker 1: '30% flaky test rate — the test suite cannot be trusted; developers have learned to ignore failures'. Short term: 'Quarantine all known flaky tests'.

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertion_results.evidence: Short term includes: 'Quarantine all known flaky tests', 'Identify and document the 5 slowest CI job segments', 'Mandate that hotfix PRs require at minimum 1 senior approval'.

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: CI/CD | 2/5 | 47-min builds; 15-year-old Jenkins; no fast feedback.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend replacing Jenkins without acknowledging migration cost
assertion_results.evidence: Medium term recommends 'Migrate CI pipeline to a modern platform (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI): parallelise test execution to bring build time under 15 minutes' without explicitly acknowledging migration cost or risk. Same failure as iteration-3.
